_comment: App project (Vite-built, not part of the `tsc -b` reference graph). Non-composite + noEmit: Vite/Rolldown owns the bundle, tsc only typechecks. `types: ["node"]` supplies Node globals for the build-time SSR entry (`entry.server.tsx` imports `node:stream`); TS 6 no longer auto-discovers @types/node here. @types/react and @types/react-dom resolve via their imports, and vite/client globals come from src/vite-env.d.ts. `rootDirs` overlays React Router's generated route types (`.react-router/types`) so route modules can `import type { Route } from "./+types/<name>"`.
